overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit, hazy Night City street at night. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes by the iconic Bohemia club while futuristic vehicles and pedestrians populate the cyberpunk urban environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing glowing green shorts walking ahead of ego on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning across the street overhead
building covered in blue and green neon signage and advertisements
metal safety railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. Neon-lit buildings line the left side while vehicles pass by on the right. A pedestrian in distinctive glowing green shorts walks ahead, leading the way through the hazy cyberpunk street.

events.description: ego steps onto yellow striped crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
ego turns right onto a curved waterfront promenade path

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk then turning right onto a waterfront walkway

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: yellow zebra crossing stripes painted on the road surface
large white digital billboard displaying a beverage advertisement

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered sidewalk into a wide intersection, crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk amidst moderate pedestrian traffic. After crossing, the character turns right onto a promenade where a canal waterway becomes visible on the right side, with towering skyscrapers looming in the hazy distance.

events.description: view opens to reveal canal waterway on right with massive holographic advertisements on distant towers

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved waterfront path with canal visible to the right

entered.detail: dark water canal running parallel to the walkway with reflections of neon lights
tall structure displaying large rotating holographic advertisements
massive futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade, the character moves past the canal waterway reflecting the city's neon glow. Massive holographic billboards and towering skyscrapers dominate the skyline ahead, while the elevated highway remains visible overhead. The atmosphere remains hazy with sparse pedestrian traffic.

events.description: passing the bright pink neon Bohemia club sign casts intense red-pink light on surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking past the Bohemia club and continuing along the street with parked cars

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark coat walking in the opposite direction past the club

entered.detail: large bright pink neon sign reading 'BOHEMIA' on the nightclub facade
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb near the club entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrower street section dominated by the intense pink neon glow of the Bohemia nightclub. Parked futuristic cars line the left side while pedestrians pass by. The canal is no longer visible as the path curves away, and massive digital billboards continue to illuminate the hazy night air.

events.description: ego waits at traffic light before proceeding across the wide intersection
ego crosses the intersection alongside other pedestrians while vehicles pass

agents.ego_description: waiting at the traffic light then crossing the wide intersection with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red hair walking ahead into the intersection
futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
broad yellow crosswalk lines marking the pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busy intersection, waiting for the traffic signal before crossing with a moderate crowd of pedestrians. A pedestrian with red hair walks ahead while futuristic vehicles navigate the crossing. The scene opens up to reveal more of the towering skyline and dense urban architecture of Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy urban corridor that transitions from a sheltered overpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of Night City. It begins on a narrow sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, following a pedestrian in glowing green shorts past neon-lit buildings. As the character emerges from the cover of the overpass, the scene opens into a wide intersection with yellow-striped crosswalks before turning right onto a waterfront promenade where a canal reflects the city's glow beneath towering skyscrapers. The path then curves away from the water and into a narrower street dominated by the intense pink neon light of the Bohemia nightclub and parked futuristic cars. Finally, the camera moves toward a busy intersection, crossing with a crowd of pedestrians to reveal the full scale of the dense urban architecture and the illuminated skyline.
